channel.title: Prometheus on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Prometheus on Arrans github.io

item.title: CodesWhat/drydock
item.description: Open source container update monitoring — 23 registries, 20 notification triggers, audit log, OIDC auth, Prometheus metrics, and a modern dashboard.

item.title: shizunge/endlessh-go
item.description: A golang implementation of endlessh (SSH tarpit) exporting Prometheus metrics, visualized by a Grafana dashboard.
